arts.ttl: Manchester City make formal offer for player after striking contract agreement – He ‘welcomes the deal’
arts.sum: Manchester City have officially made their move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, with discussions on going about the potential transfer. That’s according to GE Globo, who report that Manchester City have made a proposal for the young defender, who ‘welcomes the deal’. arts.ttl: 'Not correct' - Palmeiras president breaks silence on Man City Vitor Reis interest with clear transfer terms
arts.sum: Manchester City are hoping to sign Vitor Reis from Palmeiras in January and the Brazilian side have responded to the interest.

arts.ttl: Frankfurt line up Rennes striker as replacement for Manchester City target Marmoush

arts.ttl: Manchester City given encouragement in Marmoush chase and eye Khusanov
arts.sum: Frankfurt may consider €60m-plus bid for forward City also preparing £33m bid for Palmeiras’s Vítor Reis Manchester City are considering testing Eintracht Frankfurt’s resolve to keep highly-rated forward Omar Marmoush with a formal bid while also monitoring Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov and preparing an offer of €40m (£33m) for Palmeiras’s 18-year-old defender Vítor Reis. While Frankfurt’s official stance is that Marmoush is not for sale, it is understood the club, currently third in the Bundesliga, may countenance a €60m-plus (£50m-plus) offer for the 25-year-old Egyptian, who has scored 18 goals and provided 12 assists in all competitions this season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'We are not fooled' - Major Man City transfer update as Abdukodir Khusanov misses training
arts.sum: Manchester City have opened negotiations for Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov according to their manager Will Still.

arts.ttl: “Negotiations are underway” – Manager says he won’t lie as player edges to Manchester City transfer
arts.sum: L’Equipe and others in France have been reporting on Abdukodir Khusanov potentially moving to Manchester City all week. Given the difficulties the club have had so far this season, and the ground they need to make up in the Premier League, Pep Guardiola will be expecting additions to his Manchester City squad this month. arts.ttl: Man City injury news: Will Oscar Bobb, Ruben Dias, Ederson return? Will Erling Haaland be rested vs. Salford City in FA Cup?
arts.sum: Man City manager Pep Guardiola provides an injury update on Oscar Bobb, Ruben Dias, John Stones and Ederson ahead of Saturday's FA Cup third-round tie with Salford City.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola keeps Salford guessing over Erling Haaland ahead of FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Guardiola will consider making changes for Saturday’s third-round tie against their fourth-tier neighbours.

arts.ttl: Man City close to RECORD transfer, club confirms
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov ’s transfer to Manchester City is “in progress” according to Lens head coach Will Still, who has broken the club’s silence of the potential blockbuster deal. Khusanov has been with Lens since completing a deal worth just €100,000 from Energetik-BGU Minsk in the summer of 2023 and now 18 months on stands to become the club’s biggest transfer sale ever around the €50 million mark – 500 times what the Stade Bollaert outfit spent on him.
